block_02: With regard to your request dated
block_06: Thank you for your request to DELETE your account and ALL of your personal data. Your personal information is very important to us and
block_08: takes data protection very seriously. It is our goal to deliver the best services to our customers.
block_09: Account Deletion / Termination of Contractual Relationship
block_10: Further to your request, we have proceeded with the closing and blocking of your account and our contractual relationship has been terminated effective immediately as of the date hereof.
block_12: Our systems are generally configured to comply the principles of data minimization and necessity, so that
block_14: does not process any personal data from you which are not absolutely necessary for providing our services to you or in support of a law or regulation to which we are bound.
block_15: Having reviewed your request and our systems for your personal data, we note that all information currently held is to be retained for seven years after termination of our contractual relationship as per and in accordance with our Privacy Policy, Anti-Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing laws and regulations and other applicable laws and regulations to which we are bound (Regulations). Under the Regulations we have a legal obligation to retain your data a minimum of seven years.
block_16: If you have any questions or if you believe that your personal data is still being processed by
block_18: without taking into account the principle of necessity, please let us know by following the steps prescribed in the Privacy Policy.
block_19: We reserve all our rights and remedies.
